self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Consummation (R1): after using an Elemental Skill, ATK increases by 3.2% every second for 20s, max 6 stacks (+19.2% while on-field). The ATK increase is doubled while the wielder is off-field (+38.4%). Modeled at max stacks; pick the state matching the wielder's field presence.
